headline: JOHN DEERE PARTNERS WITH MAJOR LEAGUE BASEBALL
summary: As the nation prepares for its 250th anniversary, two American institutions today announced a new partnership: Deere & Company (NYSE: DE) and Major League Baseball (MLB). John Deere's new multi-year Major League sponsorship connects two legacy brands rooted in everyday American life, from ballfields and backyards to farms and green spaces across the country.
